plan_note: IBM Runtime selected the open-instance plan. Session mode was rejected for this account tier, so the live smoke workload was run in backend mode instead.

session_mode_error.message: Open plan is not authorized to run a session; use a different execution mode.

notes: This artifact captures a single live-QPU smoke run, not a benchmark sweep.
The workload returned a real measurement result after transpilation to the backend ISA width.
Do not treat this as checkpointed session-resume certification.
